title: Paytm Turned Profitable and Now It Is Going All In on AI
description: Paytm posts its first full-year profit and doubles down on artificial intelligence, ring-fencing all new investments for AI. With ₹13,315 crore in cash, the fintech giant is using AI for payments intelligence, fraud prevention, merchant onboarding, collections and agentic interfaces, even as it restructures after the RBI’s action on Paytm Payments Bank.
content:
Paytm's first full year of profitability has given the company something it has not had in a while, and that is confidence. It is now channelling that confidence into one clear direction...artificial intelligence (AI).

title: Cloudflare latest to cut jobs: How AI has led to more than 90,000 layoffs this year
description: Cloudflare announced on Thursday (May 7) that it will slash more than 1,100 jobs globally, reducing about 20 per cent of the workforce. The cybersecurity company is the latest to announce layoffs, citing artificial intelligence (AI). The trend of companies trimming their workforces has continued this year, with over 93,000 roles cut in the first five months
content:
Cloudflare has decided to lay off 20 per cent of its workforce. The cybersecurity company said on Thursday (May 7) it will cut more than 1,100 jobs globally as it restructures operations around adopting artificial intelligence (AI) tools.
